introSection: Gold mine coaster was a steel kiddie indoor roller coaster previously located at Fantasiland in Barranquilla, Atlántico, Colombia.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The train is designed to resemble a chain of minecarts.

fullText:
Gold mine coaster was a steel kiddie indoor roller coaster previously located at Fantasiland in Barranquilla, Atlántico, Colombia.



Yellow track and unpainted supports.

The train is designed to resemble a chain of minecarts.
